title: session — field classification
description: Session tracks physical attendance including minors. HIGH child-safeguarding responsibility: session_notes may contain incident narrative + minor's identifying details. safeguarding_incident_flag is regulator-facing. Attendance pivot rows carry minor athletes' presence — regulator-relevant.

regulated_minor: SessionAttendance.athlete_id (when athlete is a minor — 90% of academy sessions)
SessionAttendance.checked_in_at (minor's physical presence timestamp — regulatory interest)
regulated_financial: Session.cancellation_notice_at (drives refund policy — <24h notice may be non-refundable)
audit_log: Session.resource_booking_id (every swap via reschedule -> audits, warn severity)
Session.head_coach_id (every change -> audits, critical severity <24h + minors present)
Session.safeguarding_incident_flag (every flip to true -> audits, regulator-tier retention)
Session.deleted_at (audits, 7-year retention or indefinite for safeguarding)

notes: Session.session_notes MAY contain minor's identifying details when safeguarding-relevant. Never rendered on public/participant wire surfaces. Admin + owner + coach only.
SessionAttendance rows for minor athletes are per-se safeguarding records — retention floors on top of standard financial retention.
safeguarding_incident_flag=true triggers extended retention — the row survives indefinitely until manual regulator-cleared purge.
session_type='private_lesson' + 'group_lesson' are financial (Wave 4 finance invoices per lesson). cancellation_notice_at drives refund policy.
head_coach_id changes <24h before start when minors are present are critical audit — parents planned around the specific coach identity for safeguarding reasons.
